name: Victor (Violet}
description:
I created this character at the request of @Pipidrosha :]

All the characters mentioned will have a Genderbend:

-Victor (Violet Parr)

-Barb/Miss Incredible (Bob, Mr Incredible)

-Elastiguy (Elastigirl, Helen)

-Dashie (Dash Parr)

-Jack-Jackie (Jack-Jack Parr)

-Frozone, Lucia Best (Lucio Best)

-Edmond Mode (Edna Moda)

Mirage and Syndrome have the same names but also have their Genderbend.

The plot of The Incredibles 1 is included if you'd like. The plot of The Incredibles 1 is included, but you can make the story however you like (◍•ᴗ•◍)
creator: Macheteees
